title: Chapter 66
content:
Chapter 66: Chapter 66: Sword Freak

Damon continues follow Elder Selene through the inner disciple’s court until they reach the boundary between inner and core disciple court.

There is where the elder dorm is, but Elder Selene continue until the enter the end of core disciple court at the foot of the mountain where at the top where Sect Leader reside.

There were a few mansions there. Then Elder Selene slowly descend from the sky and land on of them.

Damon, who have been following her on the ground finally stopped in front of the mansion.

"Come in." a voice can be heard from inside.

Damon then enter the mansion then he saw Elder Selene standing on training arena of her mansion.

"So, Elder Selene, what do you want to talk about? I know is not about you brother Jack." Damon ask her.

"You were right, I don’t care about that trash. All I want to know is what did you do on the test."

"What is it? I know it’s not regular sword intent. I was something higher than sword intent. How do you learn it?" She asks him with excited voice.

She comes closer to Damon with sparkling eyes, and her cold expression change into a child finally found something that interest her.

’What the... Where that cold personality go?’

In front of Damon now is not the famous cold Ice Goddess that everyone talk about, but someone who only care about sword.

But she move back quickly and change back to her cold personality.

Seeing the change of expression and the gap between her two personalities, Damon change his plan.

At first, his plan was to slowly corrupt then uses Incubus Touch and make her unable to resist the allure of him. Now he see her other personality he changes his approach.

’With her personality, I don’t need Incubus Touch. All I need is the knowledge of sword form Sword Grandmaster memory to make her fall for me.’

’Her status said she want a worthy rival and she don’t want to be married with Kai Reventon. Don’t worry Selene I will make you my woman and fee you form your shackle.’

"It’s called Sword Aura. It’s the next stage of sword ability." Damon told her.

"Sword Aura? Where do you get that?" She said it with he cold voice and expressionless face but he eyes still sparkling with excitement.

"It’s from the knowledge and experience of my passed away master. Before He died, He implant his memory and experience into me, and it will slowly unlock once I pass certain understanding of sword."

Damon decide to lie to her since he can’t tell her al he need is buy it from the system.

"I see it’s your master... I wish I can meet him. Then attack me."

"What...?" Damon shock that Selene asks him to attack her suddenly.

"Attack me with you Sword Aura, I want to experience it myself." As she said that she slowly walk away and give a distance between her and Damon.

’What the fuck? She want to experience it herself so she ask me to attack her?’ as Damon thinking about it, he saw Elder Selene serious and determined expression.

’Hah.... Sword Freak huh... her trait really didn’t lie, she really crazy about sword.’

"As you wish, Elder."

"Give me you full power. I want to know how strong Sword Aura really is."

"Are you sere Elder?" Damon couldn’t help asking.

"Yes, I am a Heavenly Spirit Realm cultivator the no way I going to get hurt from someone who at True Spirit Realm."

’Well, it good time to check if my full power attack can hurt a Heavenly Spirit Realm cultivator.’

’But just in case, System, buy me heaven grade recovery pill.’

[You bought Heaven Grade Recovery Pill - Flawless Purity. -5,000 lust points.]

Then Damon check his status to see his remaining point.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - First Level]

[True Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Ninth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 65, Water: 65, Ice: 65, Wind: 65, Earth: 65, Lightning: 315, Nature: 65, Light: 65, Dark: 65, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 424,100]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

’Good, I’m ready’

Damon then reached down to his waist and unsheathed his wooden sword.

Then he slowly rise his wooden sword over his head. He then pours all his energy of Ninth Level of True Spirit Realm while still maintain his First Level of True Spirit Realm aura from the outside.

Sword intent began to accumulate and started to form into a giant invisible sword on his wooden sword. Once the shape settles down, it began solidified and change into a giant sword of sword aura.

Sword Aura is a condense and solidified sword intent that usually use like a domain, make an invisible sword that surround his body. But now he use it so surround his sword.

Unlike when he did on the test, he only used it a little bit, now he used it with full force like when he fights the Ancient Flame Tiger.

Seeing and feeling the sword aura, Selene suddenly felt a chill down to her spine.

’What is this? Why I felt danger from that?’ She thought internally.

She immediately releases her full cultivation power of Ninth Level of Heavenly Spirit Realm and makes a defensive barrier around her body.

Damon slowly swung his sword downward. The giant sword aura slowly decent following the movement of his wooden sword.

Then Damon’s sword aura and Selene’s barrier met.

BOOM!!

A loud boom can be heard and the ground shaking like an earthquake.
